nasb.text: Under an unloved woman when she gets a husband, And a maidservant when she supplants her mistress.

esv.text: an unloved woman when she gets a husband, and a maidservant when she displaces her mistress.

cnv.text: 被人厭惡的女子出嫁， 婢女接替主母的地位。

ccb.text: 丑恶女子出嫁， 婢女取代主母。

csbs.text: 令人恨恶的女子有了丈夫、 婢女赶出她的主母。
